title: COMMUNITY VETERINARY HOSPITAL - 211info
text: COMMUNITY VETERINARY HOSPITAL COMMUNITY VETERINARY HOSPITAL Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides veterinary services including preventative care, dentistry, spay and neuter services, and urgent care. Also helps with end-of-life care and pet memorial services. 7865 NE 14th Place Portland, OR 97211 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: 7 days per week 7:30am-5:30pm by appointment only Email (503) 285-7722 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (503) 285-7722 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call or visit website for information and to schedule an appointment. Does not accept walk-ins. FEES: Varies by service. Financial assistance is available. DOCUMENTS: None LANGUAGES: English, interpretation by arrangement AREA SERVED: State of Oregon SITE HOURS: 7 days per week 7:30am-5:30pm TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: Intersection of NE 14th Place and NE Columbia Blvd. Trimet Bus Lines: 6, 8, 70, 75 Services: Animal Euthanasia Services Neuter/Spay Services Rabies Vaccinations Sick Animal Care Veterinary Care Expense Assistance Well Animal Checkups If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
